# BIP-352 Test Vectors

## Source

The test vectors in `send_and_receive_test_vectors.json` are from the official BIP-352 specification:

https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/blob/master/bip-0352/send_and_receive_test_vectors.json

## License

These test vectors are part of the Bitcoin BIP repository and are provided for testing BIP-352 Silent Payments implementations.

## Attribution

Test vectors copyright © Bitcoin Core developers and contributors.
